name: Ashigaru

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

actions.name: Yari
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, this model may move up to 2".

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Spirit Rend
triggers.text: The target must have an Adversary token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Spiritual Drain
actions.effects: For each raise this action receives, this model heals 1.

merge_warnings: Tactical action 'Spiritual Drain' has resist='Wp' â€” may be attack action under tactical header (layout exception). Reclassifying as attack_action.
